T0023.title: Fake Follower Boosting
T0023.definition: A homophone for 'follower farming,' referring to the artificial inflation of social media follower counts through illegitimate means, typically by purchasing fake followers or using automated tools to create mass fake accounts that follow a specific profile. This practice is common among individuals or businesses seeking to quickly boost perceived influence or attract real users.
T0023.description: Although follower farming can rapidly increase an account's follower count, these followers largely lack activity and genuine engagement, potentially harming the account's credibility and marketing effectiveness in the long run.
T0023.usageExample: 新号开播没流量，先找渠道刷粉把门面撑起来，不然没人信你。
